pr.title: Non-record: 10L Int5-MLP + TTT + Backout Connection  (val_bpb=1.1574 on 8xH100 SXM)

output.summary: Adds EMA smoothing, a learned mid-layer backout connection, and post-quantization test-time SGD on val tokens to the quantized 10-layer Int5-MLP.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Performs 3 epochs of SGD on validation tokens after quantization to recover from quantization degradation.
techniques: EMA replacing SWA for smoother weights
Backout connection subtracting layer‑5 state before RMSNorm
Test-time SGD on validation tokens post-quantization
